homeTeam.name: The Confluence Captains
homeTeam.sponsor: The Guild of the Black Sky

stadium.name: The Glowstone Terrace
stadium.description: A massive, opulent stadium built on one of the city's main terraces, carved directly into the mountainside. The field is famously paved with polished Glowstone, and the stands overlook the bustling Confluence Market and the ongoing construction of the Guild's Skyport.

stats.pregame_ritual: Doing a terrible, clumsy dance to 'loosen the joints'.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Arm-wrestling the player who plays the same position on their team.
Speaking only in rhymes for the hour before the game.
Rubbing the Trollball on their armpits for 'grip'.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.

Covering their forearms in a sticky tree sap for 'grip'.

stadium.name: The Serpent's Pass
stadium.location: Zmeigorod, just west of the lumber mill
stadium.description: Has to be periodically rebuilt whenever the old stadium starts sinking into the swamp. Don’t worry about it.

stats.pregame_ritual: Rubbing a foul-smelling local mushroom on their elbows for flexibility.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Polishing their helmet with a live snail for good luck.
Tensing every muscle in their body at once, then releasing.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Sharing a ceremonial, non-alcoholic grog from a communal cup.
Looking each teammate in the eye and giving a single, firm nod.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Painting a single, matching stripe of mud on each player's face.

preGame: Huzzah! Gather 'round, faithful denizens of Osterra, for the clash of Titans upon the hallowed ground of The Glowstone Terrace! This is it, friends, the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures have defied the prophecies of mediocrity to claw their way into this ultimate battle, and they face the vaunted Confluence Captains! Will the mighty Snessengers from Zmeigorod bring their swampy, unrelenting fury to the mountain air? Or will the polished precision of the Captains claim this glorious victory? The very stadium, bathed in that blinding Glowstone Glare, seems poised to amplify the chaos, while the Market Day Crowd roars with anticipation! Before the whistle shrieks, we see Alded Sanjay of Zmeigorod performing his solemn rite, looking each warrior in the eye and giving a single, firm nod—a promise of bloodshed! Can these brave souls endure the Mountain Wind and the sheer ferocity of Trollball? Good heavens, I hope they can! For the Ebon Gate Corruptors cheer for utter, glorious carnage!
postGame: What a spectacle! What a display of sheer, unadulterated Trollball madness! The Confluence Captains, despite the suffocating Mountain Wind and the blinding luminescence of their home pitch, managed to hold firm, edging out the Zmeigorod Snessengers with a final score of 2 to 1! The action was relentless from the opening whistle; we witnessed Dare Wynnie deliver a crushing blow to O'Conner Maighdlin, sending him flying into the turf! The Captains then seized the momentum, first through a stunning dunk by Kleinstein MacGregor, who plowed through the defenses of Zmeigorod, and then, later in the half, a magnificent score by Ladew Evelina! The Snessengers, bless their gritty hearts, managed one moment of brilliance, seeing Alded Sanjay receive a glorious interception, before they were ultimately subdued! Oh, the carnage! Evalyn Pierrepont, Arni Griffith, and O'Conner Maighdlin all went down in the pile, testament to the beautiful brutality of this sport! While those pompous heroes of the realm fuss about their political maneuvering, these gladiators are proving that true power lies not in a decree, but in a well-aimed tackle! The Captains take the first blood, but the Corruptors are ready to cheer the absolute annihilation of every opposing player on this fine day!
